slam.start_command: source /opt/ros/melodic/setup.bash; source /home/s/catkin_ws/devel/setup.bash; export TURTLEBOT3_MODEL=burger; exec roslaunch turtlebot3_slam turtlebot3_slam.launch slam_methods:=gmapping
slam.save_map_command: source /opt/ros/melodic/setup.bash; source /home/s/catkin_ws/devel/setup.bash; mkdir -p /home/s/maps; rosrun map_server map_saver -f /home/s/maps/latest_map
